biological_inference: danio_albolineatus has no Bonferroni-significant markers at depth 10; 29 female-biased high-posterior marker(s) define a putative W-linked RAD marker hypothesis for validation. 158 Bayes-factor-only row(s) are held out of the sex-system call. Singleton fraction is 20.0%.
notothenia_rossii has no strict or high-posterior markers at depth 10; 400 Bayes-factor-only row(s) are not treated as sex-linked markers. Singleton fraction is 52.8%.

plecoglossus_altivelis has 47 male-biased strict markers at depth 10, consistent with putative Y-linked RAD markers and a male-heterogametic XX/XY system. Posterior evidence adds 2 lower-stringency marker(s) for PCR or genome-mapping validation. 523 Bayes-factor-only row(s) remain below the posterior call threshold. Singleton fraction is 37.9%.

tinca_tinca has 6 male-biased strict markers at depth 10, consistent with putative Y-linked RAD markers and a male-heterogametic XX/XY system. Posterior evidence adds 5 lower-stringency marker(s) for PCR or genome-mapping validation. 432 Bayes-factor-only row(s) remain below the posterior call threshold. Singleton fraction is 7.7%.
